title: Tupanatinga Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tupanatinga, with a Z-Score of +3.03. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Tupanatinga is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 48%, and wind speed is moderate at 11.3 km/h. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, suggesting a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
